metadata._description: MySQL Security Monitoring Workbook - Audit Logs + VirusTotal Threat Intelligence

metadata.description: Full resource ID of the Log Analytics workspace

properties.serializedData:
[concat('{"version":"Notebook/1.0","items":[{"type":9,"content":{"version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","parameters":[{"id":"p_timerange","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","name":"TimeRange","type":4,"isRequired":true,"value":{"durationMs":86400000},"typeSettings":{"selectableValues":[{"durationMs":3600000},{"durationMs":14400000},{"durationMs":43200000},{"durationMs":86400000},{"durationMs":172800000},{"durationMs":259200000},{"durationMs":604800000}]},"label":"Time Range"},{"id":"p_server","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","name":"ServerName","type":2,"isRequired":false,"query":"MySqlAuditLogs
| extend ServerName = tostring(split(_ResourceId, "/")[-1])
| distinct ServerName
| order by ServerName asc","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","value":null,"label":"MySQL Server"}],"style":"pills","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces"},"name":"parameters"},{"type":11,"content":{"version":"LinkItem/1.0","style":"tabs","links":[{"id":"tab_overview","cellValue":"tab","linkTarget":"parameter","linkLabel":"Overview","subTarget":"overview","style":"link"},{"id":"tab_bruteforce","cellValue":"tab","linkTarget":"parameter","linkLabel":"Brute Force","subTarget":"bruteforce","style":"link"},{"id":"tab_threatintel","cellValue":"tab","linkTarget":"parameter","linkLabel":"Threat Intel","subTarget":"threatintel","style":"link"},{"id":"tab_sql","cellValue":"tab","linkTarget":"parameter","linkLabel":"SQL Activity","subTarget":"sql","style":"link"},{"id":"tab_connections","cellValue":"tab","linkTarget":"parameter","linkLabel":"Connections","subTarget":"connections","style":"link"}]},"name":"tabs"},{"type":12,"content":{"version":"NotebookGroup/1.0","groupType":"editable","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## MySQL Security Overview
---"},"name":"overview_title"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"let DisconnectedSessions = MySqlAuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where EventSubclass == "DISCONNECT"
| distinct ConnectionId;
MySqlAuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where EventSubclass == "CONNECT"
| extend IsSuccess = iff(ConnectionId in (DisconnectedSessions), 1, 0)
| summarize TotalConnections = count(), SuccessfulConnections = countif(IsSuccess == 1), FailedConnections = countif(IsSuccess == 0), UniqueIPs = dcount(Ip), UniqueUsers = dcount(User)
| extend FailureRate = round(todouble(FailedConnections) / todouble(TotalConnections) * 100, 1)","size":4,"title":"Key Metrics","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"tiles","tileSettings":{"titleContent":{"formatter":1},"leftContent":{"columnMatch":"TotalConnections","formatter":12,"formatOptions":{"palette":"auto"}},"showBorder":true}},"name":"overview_tiles"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"let DisconnectedSessions = MySqlAuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where EventSubclass == "DISCONNECT"
| distinct ConnectionId;
MySqlAuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where EventSubclass == "CONNECT"
| extend IsSuccess = iff(ConnectionId in (DisconnectedSessions), "Success", "Failed")
| summarize Count = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), IsSuccess
| order by TimeGenerated asc","size":0,"title":"Connection Trend (Success vs Failed)","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"barchart","chartSettings":{"seriesLabelSettings":[{"seriesName":"Failed","color":"red"},{"seriesName":"Success","color":"green"}]}},"name":"overview_trend"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"let DisconnectedSessions = MySqlAuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where EventSubclass == "DISCONNECT"
| distinct ConnectionId;
MySqlAuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where EventSubclass == "CONNECT"
| where ConnectionId !in (DisconnectedSessions)
| extend ResourceName = tostring(split(_ResourceId, "/")[-1])
| summarize FailedConnections = count(), AttemptedUsers = make_set(User, 5) by Ip, ResourceName
| order by FailedConnections desc
| take 10","size":0,"title":"Top 10 Suspicious IPs (Failed Connections)","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"FailedConnections","formatter":8,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redDark"}}]}},"name":"overview_top_ips"}]},"conditionalVisibility":{"parameterName":"tab","comparison":"isEqualTo","value":"overview"},"name":"group_overview"},{"type":12,"content":{"version":"NotebookGroup/1.0","groupType":"editable","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## Brute Force Detection
---
Detects IPs with high failed connection counts using CONNECT without matching DISCONNECT pattern."},"name":"bf_title"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"let DisconnectedSessions = MySqlAuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where EventSubclass == "DISCONNECT"
| distinct ConnectionId;
MySqlAuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where EventSubclass == "CONNECT"
| where ConnectionId !in (DisconnectedSessions)
| extend ResourceName = tostring(split(_ResourceId, "/")[-1])
| summarize FailedConnections = count(), FirstAttempt = min(TimeGenerated), LastAttempt = max(TimeGenerated), DistinctUsers = dcount(User), AttemptedUsers = make_set(User, 10) by Ip, ResourceName
| where FailedConnections >= 5
| extend AttackDurationMin = datetime_diff("minute", LastAttempt, FirstAttempt)
| extend AttackRate = round(todouble(FailedConnections) / max_of(todouble(AttackDurationMin), 1.0), 1)
| order by FailedConnections desc","size":0,"title":"Brute Force Attempts","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"FailedConnections","formatter":8,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redDark"}},{"columnMatch":"AttackRate","formatter":8,"formatOptions":{"palette":"orange"}}]}},"name":"bf_table"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"let DisconnectedSessions = MySqlAuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where EventSubclass == "DISCONNECT"
| distinct ConnectionId;
MySqlAuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where EventSubclass == "CONNECT"
| where ConnectionId !in (DisconnectedSessions)
| summarize FailedAttempts = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m), Ip
| order by TimeGenerated asc","size":0,"title":"Brute Force Timeline (per IP)","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"linechart"},"name":"bf_timeline"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"let DisconnectedSessions = MySqlAuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where EventSubclass == "DISCONNECT"
| distinct ConnectionId;
MySqlAuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where EventSubclass == "CONNECT"
| where ConnectionId !in (DisconnectedSessions)
| summarize Count = count() by User
| order by Count desc
| take 10","size":0,"title":"Targeted Usernames","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"piechart"},"name":"bf_users"}]},"conditionalVisibility":{"parameterName":"tab","comparison":"isEqualTo","value":"bruteforce"},"name":"group_bruteforce"},{"type":12,"content":{"version":"NotebookGroup/1.0","groupType":"editable","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## VirusTotal Threat Intelligence
---
IP reputation enrichment from VirusTotal. ThreatScore = Malicious + Suspicious engine detections."},"name":"ti_title"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"MySqlThreatIntel_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by IPAddress
| project IPAddress, ResourceName_s, FailedConnections_d, ThreatScore_d, VT_Malicious_d, VT_Suspicious_d, VT_Harmless_d, VT_Country_s, VT_ASOwner_s, VT_Network_s, AttemptedUsers_s, TimeGenerated
| order by ThreatScore_d desc","size":0,"title":"Enriched Threat IPs","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"ThreatScore_d","formatter":8,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redDark"}},{"columnMatch":"VT_Malicious_d","formatter":8,"formatOptions":{"palette":"red"}},{"columnMatch":"FailedConnections_d","formatter":8,"formatOptions":{"palette":"orange"}}]}},"name":"ti_table"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"MySqlThreatIntel_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by IPAddress
| summarize Count = count() by VT_Country_s
| order by Count desc","size":0,"title":"Threat IPs by Country","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"piechart"},"name":"ti_country"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"MySqlThreatIntel_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by IPAddress
| summarize Count = count() by VT_ASOwner_s
| order by Count desc
| take 10","size":0,"title":"Threat IPs by AS Owner","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"barchart"},"name":"ti_asn"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"MySqlThreatIntel_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by IPAddress
| extend ThreatLevel = case(ThreatScore_d >= 5, "High", ThreatScore_d >= 3, "Medium", "Low")
| summarize Count = count() by ThreatLevel","size":0,"title":"Threat Level Distribution","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"piechart","chartSettings":{"seriesLabelSettings":[{"seriesName":"High","color":"red"},{"seriesName":"Medium","color":"orange"},{"seriesName":"Low","color":"green"}]}},"name":"ti_level"}]},"conditionalVisibility":{"parameterName":"tab","comparison":"isEqualTo","value":"threatintel"},"name":"group_threatintel"},{"type":12,"content":{"version":"NotebookGroup/1.0","groupType":"editable","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## SQL Activity Monitoring
---
DDL, DCL and suspicious SQL operations."},"name":"sql_title"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"MySqlAuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where EventClass == "general_log"
| where SqlText has_any ("CREATE", "ALTER", "DROP", "TRUNCATE", "RENAME")
| extend ResourceName = tostring(split(_ResourceId, "/")[-1])
| project TimeGenerated, ResourceName, User, Ip, SqlText
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50","size":0,"title":"DDL Operations (CREATE/ALTER/DROP)","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table"},"name":"sql_ddl"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"MySqlAuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where EventClass == "general_log"
| where SqlText has_any ("GRANT", "REVOKE", "CREATE USER", "DROP USER", "ALTER USER")
| extend ResourceName = tostring(split(_ResourceId, "/")[-1])
| project TimeGenerated, ResourceName, User, Ip, SqlText
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50","size":0,"title":"DCL Operations (GRANT/REVOKE/User Management)","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table"},"name":"sql_dcl"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"MySqlAuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where EventClass == "general_log"
| where SqlText matches regex "(?i)(UNION\\s+SELECT|OR\\s+1\\s*=\\s*1|DROP\\s+TABLE|--\\s|/\\*.*\\*/|SLEEP\\s*\\(|BENCHMARK\\s*\\()"
| extend ResourceName = tostring(split(_ResourceId, "/")[-1])
| project TimeGenerated, ResourceName, User, Ip, SqlText
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50","size":0,"title":"Potential SQL Injection Attempts","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"SqlText","formatter":1,"formatOptions":{"customColumnWidthSetting":"60%"}}]}},"name":"sql_injection"}]},"conditionalVisibility":{"parameterName":"tab","comparison":"isEqualTo","value":"sql"},"name":"group_sql"},{"type":12,"content":{"version":"NotebookGroup/1.0","groupType":"editable","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## Connection Analysis
---
MySQL connection patterns and anomalies."},"name":"conn_title"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"MySqlAuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where EventSubclass == "CONNECT"
| summarize Connections = count() by User
| order by Connections desc
| take 15","size":0,"title":"Connections by User","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"barchart"},"name":"conn_by_user"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"MySqlAuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where EventSubclass == "CONNECT"
| summarize Connections = count() by Ip
| order by Connections desc
| take 15","size":0,"title":"Connections by Source IP","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"barchart"},"name":"conn_by_ip"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"MySqlAuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where EventSubclass == "CONNECT"
| summarize Connections = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 15m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc","size":0,"title":"Connection Volume Over Time","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"areachart"},"name":"conn_timeline"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"MySqlAuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where EventSubclass in ("CONNECT", "DISCONNECT")
| extend ResourceName = tostring(split(_ResourceId, "/")[-1])
| summarize ConnectCount = countif(EventSubclass == "CONNECT"), DisconnectCount = countif(EventSubclass == "DISCONNECT") by ResourceName
| extend PendingConnections = ConnectCount - DisconnectCount
| project ResourceName, ConnectCount, DisconnectCount, PendingConnections","size":0,"title":"Connection Balance per Server","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"PendingConnections","formatter":8,"formatOptions":{"palette":"orange"}}]}},"name":"conn_balance"}]},"conditionalVisibility":{"parameterName":"tab","comparison":"isEqualTo","value":"connections"},"name":"group_connections"}],"isLocked":false}')]
